home.heroSubtitle: A full-service Jakarta law firm providing strategic legal counsel across bankruptcy, litigation, corporate, and finance.
home.aboutText: Founded by {founder}, Soaloan Tua Nababan & Partners has established itself as a trusted legal practice in Jakarta. We combine deep legal expertise with a client-focused approach, guided by three core principles that define everything we do.
home.servicesSubtitle: Three practice pillars. Twelve areas of expertise. One standard: the highest.
home.articlesSubtitle: Perspectives from our practice: regulatory shifts, case analyses, and strategic guidance for Indonesian business.
home.ctaText: Reach out to discuss how we can support your next legal challenge.
home.clientsTitle: Clients Who Trust Us With What Matters
home.clientsIntro: Our reputation is built on the success of those we represent. From multinational financial institutions to emerging regional leaders, we provide the steady legal counsel required to navigate Indonesia's complex regulatory landscape and high-stakes commercial disputes.
home.secondaryTitle: Trusted Counsel for the Matters That Define Your Business
home.secondarySub: Since 2018, STNP has represented major corporations, banks, and international investors in Indonesia's most consequential legal proceedings. We combine rigorous legal strategy with uncompromising integrity.
home.highlightsSubtitle: A selection of notable matters handled by our partners across complex industries and high-stakes transactions.
home.highlightsDisclaimer: Matters are presented in anonymized form. Prior results do not guarantee similar outcomes.

meta.title: About Our Firm — Soaloan Tua Nababan & Partners
meta.description: STNP is a full-service Jakarta law firm founded in 2018. We provide strategic legal counsel across commercial litigation, corporate transactions, bankruptcy, and industry-specific advisory — with direct partner involvement on every matter.

hero.title: About Our Firm
hero.subtitle: A legacy of strategic counsel, built in Jakarta since 2018.
hero.body: Soaloan Tua Nababan & Partners is a full-service Indonesian law firm with a singular focus: delivering rigorous, partner-led legal counsel to the clients and matters that demand it most. We combine the depth of a seasoned practice with the agility of a deliberate boutique.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: Building Trust Through Legal Excellence
story.p1: Soaloan Tua Nababan & Partners was founded in 2018 by Oswald Anggi Soaloan, S.H. — originally under the name Soaloan and Partners — with a clear and deliberate purpose: to bridge the gap between international-caliber legal services and the deep, practical expertise that only comes from years of immersion in Indonesia's legal landscape.
story.p2: Before establishing the firm, Oswald built a distinguished career in business law, working across the mining, plantation, property, banking, finance, and energy sectors. He served as legal counsel to major Indonesian corporations, gaining firsthand experience in the complexity and consequence of high-stakes legal matters. That background was not coincidental — it was the foundation upon which STNP's client-first philosophy was deliberately constructed.

expansion.label: The 2021 Expansion
expansion.body: After three years of measured, principled growth, STNP expanded its partnership in 2021 — a strategic decision that deepened the firm's capacity across transactions, commercial litigation, and insolvency proceedings.
expansion.partner1Name: Gideon Putra Tua Sitorus, S.H., M.H.
expansion.partner1Bio: Bringing extensive experience in corporate transactions, commercial litigation, and plantation law — Gideon joined to anchor the firm's transactional and advisory capability.
expansion.partner2Name: Daniel Perdana Saoloan Nababan, S.H., M.H.
expansion.partner2Bio: A specialist in bankruptcy and insolvency proceedings for both international and Indonesian clients — Daniel expanded the firm's ability to handle the most complex restructuring and creditor-representation matters.
expansion.almaMater: All three founding partners are alumni of Gadjah Mada University (UGM), one of Indonesia's most prestigious faculties of law. Their shared academic foundation, combined with decades of complementary professional experience, created the conditions for a firm capable of taking on consequential, high-stakes matters with full confidence.

philosophy.label: The STNP Philosophy
philosophy.intro: These are not marketing principles. They are the operating commitments that govern how we work — and how we do not.

p01.title: Strategic Resolution
p01.body: We do not approach legal problems in isolation. Before we advise any course of action, we take the time to understand our client's underlying business objectives, risk tolerance, and long-term position. Legal action that solves the immediate problem but creates a future one is not good counsel. We build strategies designed to resolve matters durably.

p02.title: Principled Efficiency
p02.body: We believe that effective legal representation does not require unnecessary work. We are not the firm that introduces complexity to justify its fees. Our mandate is to advise the most effective course of action at the most efficient cost — prioritizing genuine mutual benefit over the appearance of thoroughness.

p03.title: Strong Relationship
p03.body: Accurate legal counsel requires honest information. We cultivate the kind of client relationship where that information flows freely — built on consistent communication, demonstrated reliability, and a clear alignment of interests. We do not hand cases off. We stay involved. That continuity is how we truly understand what our clients need.

why.label: Why STNP
why.title: The Unfair Advantage
why.subtitle: The agility of a boutique firm. The pedigree of top-tier counsel.
why.p1: Unlike larger firms where partner attention is rationed by hierarchy, STNP operates on a different premise: our founding partners are directly involved in your matter from the initial consultation to final resolution. You will not be handed off to a junior associate while your partner moves to the next client. You get senior partner attention throughout.
why.p2: This is not a service promise — it is a structural fact of how we are built. The firm's deliberate size means every client relationship matters, every matter receives genuine focus, and every strategy is developed at the level where legal judgment is actually formed. We combine the rigor of a top-tier firm with the responsiveness that only a boutique can offer.

commitment.label: Our Commitment
commitment.title: Pro Bono & Social Responsibility
commitment.body: Access to legal representation should not be determined by financial circumstance. STNP is committed to pro bono practice as an expression of the same principles that govern our paid work — not as a peripheral program, but as a genuine professional obligation. We dedicate time and resources to providing legal assistance to individuals and organizations who need it and cannot otherwise afford it. Justice, in our view, is not a premium service.

visit.label: Visit Us
visit.title: Ready to discuss your legal needs?
visit.subtitle: Our Office
visit.body: We are based in the heart of Jakarta's central business district, well-positioned to serve clients across the city and throughout Indonesia.

disclaimerFull.title: Legal Disclaimer
disclaimerFull.p1: The materials provided on this website have been prepared by Soaloan Tua Nababan & Partners ("STNP") for general informational purposes only. This content does not constitute legal advice, and you should not rely on it as such. The information presented here is not a substitute for consulting with a qualified attorney regarding your specific legal situation. STNP expressly disclaims all liability with respect to actions taken or not taken based on any or all of the contents of this website.
disclaimerFull.p2: Accessing, reading, or interacting with the information on this website does not establish an attorney-client relationship between you and Soaloan Tua Nababan & Partners. Such a relationship can only be formed through a formal, written agreement signed by our firm. If you require legal advice or have specific legal questions, please consult with one of our attorneys or seek legal counsel from a qualified professional in your jurisdiction.
disclaimerFull.confidentiality: Do not send confidential information to us through this website or by email until you have established a formal attorney-client relationship with our firm.
disclaimerFull.p3: You should assume that STNP may have professional relationships with providers of goods and services mentioned within this website. STNP does not necessarily endorse, and is not responsible for, any third-party content that may be accessed through this website.
disclaimerFull.p4: The use of this website and the information it contains is also subject to the terms and conditions outlined in our Privacy Policy. If you have any questions regarding these terms, please contact us at admin@stnp.co.id.
